scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/extension/tsconfig.json && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-wuzzuf build && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/openclaw-wuzzuf build && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-host build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/extension/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-wuzzuf typecheck && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/openclaw-wuzzuf typecheck && npm run --workspace @extension-jobs/composio-host typecheck
